plugins.name: tasks-plugin
plugins.author: Plekt
plugins.description: Kanban for humans, MCP for agents. One board, same tasks. Per-project columns, task types, authored comments, eighteen MCP tools.

plugins.name: projects-plugin
plugins.author: Plekt
plugins.description: Workspaces for humans, MCP for agents. Group tasks, notes, and pomodoros into projects you can favourite, archive, and colour. Eight MCP tools.

plugins.name: notes-plugin
plugins.author: Plekt
plugins.description: Notes for humans, MCP for agents. Quick capture for fleeting thoughts, project docs and folders for structured knowledge, full revision history. Thirteen MCP tools.

plugins.name: pomodoro-plugin
plugins.author: Plekt
plugins.description: Timers for humans, MCP for agents. Work, task, and pause sessions with pause-resume, per-task stats, and live badges on kanban cards. Seven MCP tools.

plugins.name: scheduler-plugin
plugins.author: Plekt
plugins.description: Schedule recurring prompts, dispatch them to chosen agents, track every fire and run. Week, month, and list views, seven MCP tools.

plugins.name: voice-plugin
plugins.author: Plekt
plugins.description: Push-to-talk voice for every text field, MCP for agents. Plug in any Whisper-compatible endpoint (self-hosted or OpenAI), hold the mic, get text. Four MCP tools.
